home.heroHeadline: I transform complex problems into viable digital solutions with business impact
home.heroBody: I approach digital product development from the intersection of functional analysis and experience design. My work is to guide the process so that technical complexity, user needs, and business objectives align into intuitive, viable, and profitable solutions.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Research. Analyze. Diagnose. Synthesize. Design. Negotiate. Argue. Prototype. Test. Validate. Manage. Document.
